description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a combination of black metal roofing, red brick walls, and wooden paneling. The front facade is dominated by large floor-to-ceiling glass windows, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoor paved and grassy areas. A prominent brick chimney rises from the roof, adding a traditional touch to the otherwise contemporary structure. The side and rear elevations are mostly solid brick, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The property is enclosed by a low fence and gate, and there is a sheltered carport or covered area adjacent to the main entrance. The overall structure is single-story, compact, and designed for urban residential living.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with black metal roofing, red brick and wood paneling, large glass windows, and a prominent chimney. Features a paved entry, grassy yard, and a sheltered carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, paved entry, grassy yard, and the main entrance with a covered area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid brick wall, black metal roof, and the chimney; minimal window openings visible.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a continuous brick wall and black roof, with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: Back/side view showing the covered carport, wooden paneling, and a partial view of the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing glass windows
